{{Quote|Sir, we've lost our bridge deflector shield!|An [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] [[Unidentified Imperial officer (Executor)/Legends|bridge officer]], during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]|<ref name="Star Wars Episode 6: Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref>}}
The '''ISD-72x deflector shield generator/sensor dome''' was a local-area [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] and sensor array produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and commonly installed on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].

==Description==
[[File:DeflectorShieldGeneratorDome-FF43.png|thumb|left|180px|A deflector shield generator dome schematic]]

The ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome was a model of [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] utilized the domes on their [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], with a pair of the generators being positioned on the [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] [[Conning tower/Legends|conning tower]]. Each dome was raised up, supported on stabilizer struts and fed by power feeds that connected to a [[Power coupling/Legends|power coupling]] in the base of the dome.<ref name="EGWT" /> The generator domes drew power directly from the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]]<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> via [[Power relay/Legends|power relays]] located deep within the conning tower.<ref name="ITW:OT" />

An [[Armor/Legends|armored]] shell covered the vital components, including the [[shield matrix]] and [[Shield Actuator]].<ref name="EGWT" /> Spaced around the top of the dome were several deflector shield projector vanes that provided local protection to conning tower.<ref name="ITW:OT" /> The vanes projected both [[Ray shield/Legends|ray]] and [[Particle shield/Legends|particle shields]] and were spaced evenly around the dome's crest, one function per vane.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The domes also featured [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] banks<ref name="NEGWT" /> feeding targeting data to the ship's gunnery stations, and [[Hyperwave transceiver/Legends|hyperwave transceiver]] coils.<ref name="ITW:OT" /> The globes were vulnerable to suicide attacks from small [[Starship/Legends|starships]]<ref name="NEGWT" /> or dedicated attacks from [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="Star Wars Episode 6: Return of the Jedi" />

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] used one of these shield generators at [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]].<ref name="SWR:TSOS" />

{{Tech-stub}}
